headline: COWG Is Up While QQQ Slips. What the Free Cash Flow Screen Is Actually Doing
summary: Most ETF names tell you what they own. COWG tells you what it believes in. Pacer US Large Cap Cash Cows Growth Leaders ETF (NYSEARCA:COWG) screens for large-cap US companies generating strong projected free cash flows with above-average earnings growth, a methodology that sounds straightforward but produces a portfolio that looks nothing like the S&P ... COWG Is Up While QQQ Slips. What the Free Cash Flow Screen Is Actually Doing

headline: Jim Cramer Says “I Should Have Pulled the Trigger on Regeneron”
summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ:REGN) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer looked at. When a caller inquired about the stock, Cramer said: Oh man, you know what? I should have pulled the trigger on Regeneron when I sat down with them at the JPMorgan conference. I realized that the Charitable Trust should have owned it. […]
